requestTransport.description: Select email or a public GitHub issue. The requester supplies and controls any credential required by the chosen transport.

transactionHash.description: One public Ethereum Mainnet transaction hash.

publicDocumentUrls.description: One or two public HTTPS inputs for an agent-facing service: a public repository, sandbox, protocol specification, static JSON, Markdown, or text document, or a public unauthenticated x402 resource URL whose current HTTP 402 response supplies PaymentRequired. Do not provide credentialed endpoints, PaymentPayload, signature headers, keys, or wallet connections.

replyEmail.description: A reachable reply address for clarification and the written quote. Required only for email transport.

claimantRole.description: Optional stated role or relationship to the transaction; this is not identity verification.

workflow.expectedResponse: A clarification request, complete written quote, or separately human-approved SOW in the selected reply channel; a request alone creates no service entitlement.
